findings.description: The document title 'Draft Cape Fear River Water Supply Evaluation' is italicized in the PDF but rendered in plain quotes without italics in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF shows italicized text for the document title; HTML shows it in regular (non-italic) text within quotation marks.

findings.description: The document title 'Draft Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocation Recommendations' is italicized in the PDF but rendered without italics in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF shows italicized text for the document title; HTML shows it in regular text within quotation marks.

findings.description: The URL in the PDF is rendered as a clickable hyperlink with blue underlined styling; in the HTML it appears as plain text without hyperlink formatting.
findings.evidence: PDF shows blue underlined hyperlink; HTML shows the URL as plain unstyled text.

findings.description: The word 'here' appears as hyperlinks in the PDF (blue, underlined) for meeting location maps, but in the HTML they appear as plain text without hyperlink styling.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'here' is a blue underlined hyperlink in two instances; HTML: 'here' appears as regular text with a period.

findings.description: The email address 'jla4-cfrwse@lists.ncmail.net' is styled as a hyperlink in the PDF but appears as plain text in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF shows blue underlined email link; HTML shows it as plain text.

findings.description: The URL in the PDF is rendered as a clickable hyperlink, but in the HTML it is presented as plain text without an anchor tag, losing the hyperlink functionality.
findings.evidence: PDF has a clickable hyperlink to 'http://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/water-resources/planning/basin-planning/map-page/cape-fear-river-basin-landing/jordan-lake-water-supply-allocation/jordan-lake-water-supply-allocation-round-4'. HTML renders it as plain text without <a> tags.

findings.description: The email address in the PDF is a clickable mailto link, but in the HTML it is rendered as plain text without an anchor tag.
findings.evidence: PDF has clickable 'jla4-cfrwse@lists.ncmail.net' email link. HTML renders it as plain text.

findings.description: The two 'here' hyperlinks for meeting location maps in the PDF are rendered as plain text 'here' in the HTML without any link.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'A map of the location for this meeting is available here.' with 'here' as a clickable link. HTML: same text but 'here' is plain text with no anchor tag.

findings.description: The subtitle 'Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocations and Cape Fear Water Supply Evaluation' is rendered as h2 in the HTML, but in the PDF it appears as a subtitle/subheading rather than a distinct section heading. This is an acceptable interpretation but worth noting.
findings.evidence:
PDF shows it as a subtitle line. HTML:

Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocations and Cape Fear Water Supply Evaluation

findings.description: The HTML has nested <main> tags, creating a structural duplication of the main content wrapper.
